english: What is two-factor authentication and how is it used in India to secure online banking?
hindi: भारत में ऑनलाइन बैंकिंग को सुरक्षित करने के लिए दो-कारक प्रमाणीकरण क्या है और इसका उपयोग कैसे किया जाता है?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் இணையவழி வங்கி கடனை பாதுகாப்பதற்காக இரு காரணிகள் அடையாளம் என்ன?
vietnamese: Hai yếu tố xác thực là gì và nó được sử dụng như thế nào ở Ấn Độ để bảo mật ngân hàng trực tuyến?
correct_answer: Two-factor authentication is a security process in which users provide a second form of verification in addition to a password, such as a one-time password sent to their registered mobile number. This is commonly used in India to secure online banking transactions.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating a specific type of two-factor authentication or refusing to answer due to lack of knowledge about Indian banking regulations.
